name: claude-accessible-monorepo
description: Accessible AI coding tools — CLI and VS Code extension for screen reader users.
author: Jacqueline McGraw (Team Snowdust)

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run compile -w packages/vscode-extension
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/core && npm test -w packages/cli
